login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Please enter your credentials to access the gym management system.
login.hero_desc: A comprehensive solution to control staff, packages and customer experience at the highest level.

error.forbidden: Your account has been locked. Please contact the administrator.
error.not_found: Account does not exist in the system.
error.network: Cannot connect to server. Please check your network.
error.default: An error occurred, please try again.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password?
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your registered email — we will send you a password reset link.
forgot_password.success_desc: A password reset link has been sent to {{email}}. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

error.not_found: This email does not exist in the system. Please check again.
error.server_error: Cannot send email. Please check the email address or try again later.
error.default: An error occurred. Please try again.

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
reset_password.success_desc: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to login...
reset_password.invalid_token_desc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

error.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.default: An error occurred. Please try again.

validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
